recommendations: Add .github/workflows/validate.yml for PR validation on jobs/ changes
Add .github/workflows/deploy-jobs.yml for automated job page deployment

gate_2.issue: non-broad-source manual jobs failing roleRelevant check rejected as noise (line 1086-1090)
